hero.title: National support for a new vision of Cameroon
hero.description: Show your commitment by signing this online petition. Every signature strengthens a peaceful citizen movement for change.
hero.author: Maurice Kamto — National President
hero.progressText: Together, let us move toward our civic goal.

petition.title: Petition text
petition.subtitle: Take a moment to read the content before signing.
petition.content:
The Cameroonian people deserve fairer, more transparent governance that is closer to their daily realities.

Through this petition, we express our will to support a national vision led by National President Maurice Kamto.

We call for:
- better respect for citizens' rights,
- improved living conditions,
- fair governance,
- a clear commitment to the future of Cameroon.

By signing this petition, each citizen adds their voice to a peaceful, republican, and constructive movement for change.

Your signature matters.

form.title: Sign the petition
form.subtitle: Fill out the form below to add your support.
form.requiredAlert: Please fill in your last name and first name.
form.success: Thank you {{firstname}} {{lastname}}, your signature has been recorded.

footer.title: Citizen petition
footer.description: A civic mobilization platform dedicated to the free, peaceful, and democratic expression of Cameroonian citizens.
footer.rightsText: This platform respects the principles of equality, non-discrimination, and inclusion. Every person, regardless of origin, gender, or social condition, can freely express their opinion.
footer.bottom: Independent civic platform • Respect • Inclusion • Freedom of expression
